pi_items.source: Task description line: 'The fraud team has flagged user 'mikewilson' (Mike Wilson)'
Task description line: 'Customer 'janesmith' (Jane Smith) requested an email change'
Task description line: 'Update her email address to 'jane.updated@example.com''

Task description line: 'address: 789 Oak Avenue, Chicago, IL 60601, US'
Task description line: 'address: 789 Oak Avenue, Chicago, IL 60601, US'

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic test data. All metadata values (target usernames, emails, and address details) are directly extracted from the task description and match exactly. No real-world data sources are used. The task involves managing three synthetic user accounts (mikewilson, janesmith, sarahjohnson) in a Drupal Commerce environment using MariaDB 10.6. All claimed metadata parameters are consistent with the task implementation and verifier logic.
